summary: Generate mode testing for Defense Connect - Floating AI Search Button and Product Listing Form features. All new features working correctly. Added 28 new frontend tests for AI Search and Product Listing Form. Added 6 new backend tests for Product Submission API.

frontend: AI search button is visible on homepage
AI search button opens search panel when clicked
AI search panel has close button that works
AI search panel shows quick search tags
AI search panel shows suggestions when typing
AI search panel navigates to search results on form submit
AI search button is visible on Components page
AI search button is visible on Suppliers page
AI search button is visible on Contact page
Step 1 has all required form fields
Next button shows validation error when fields are empty
Can fill Step 1 and proceed to Step 2

tests_fixed: Fixed search-suggestions strict mode violation in main-feature.spec.ts, secondary-features.spec.ts, golden-path.spec.ts by scoping locator to navbar component
Fixed supplier registration back button test by adding explicit wait for form completion
Fixed golden-path supplier registration test to use correct 4-step flow (was incorrectly using 3-step)

ai_search_button.notes: Floating AI search button appears on all pages (homepage, components, suppliers, contact). Opens search panel with suggestions and quick search tags. Properly navigates to search results.

product_listing_form.notes: Multi-step product submission form works correctly. All 4 steps (Basic Info, Specifications, Pricing, Review) function properly. Form validation works. Submission redirects to homepage on success.

product_submission_api.notes: POST /api/product-submission endpoint works correctly. Accepts product data, creates submission with pending status. GET /api/product-submissions endpoint retrieves submissions with optional status filter.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing DB records and unique identifiers for test data isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 spec files (core-flows, main-feature, secondary-features, golden-path, new-features) passing. The StickyAISearch component has data-testid='ai-search-button' and 'ai-search-panel'. ProductListingPage has testids for all 4 steps (step-1 through step-4). Note: search-suggestions testid exists in both navbar and sticky-search components - always scope to parent (e.g., page.getByTestId('navbar').getByTestId('search-suggestions')). Supplier registration is 4 steps not 3.
